description_long: This is a two-story modern house with a rectangular footprint, featuring a symmetrical facade and a flat, dark-tiled roof. The front of the house is adorned with a balcony running the length of the upper floor, supported by white columns and railings, and a central entryway with steps leading up to the main door. Large windows are arranged in neat, horizontal rows on both floors, providing ample natural light. The property is landscaped with palm trees and other greenery, and includes a paved driveway with a parked car on one side. At the rear, there is a swimming pool surrounded by lounge chairs and a privacy wall, creating a private outdoor leisure area. The overall design is clean and contemporary, with a focus on outdoor living and open sightlines.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, symmetrical balconies, large windows, and a landscaped yard featuring a pool and driveway. The design emphasizes clean lines, outdoor leisure, and contemporary aesthetics.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, symmetrical balconies, driveway with car, and landscaped yard with palm trees.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the driveway, car, and the arrangement of trees along the side of the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the swimming pool, lounge chairs, privacy wall, and the full length of the balcony and windows.
description_view_3: Angled rear view focusing on the pool area, backyard landscaping, and the back facade of the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with steps, double doors, balcony above, and flanked by columns and decorative railings.
